title: PACCAR (PCAR) Makes Equity Investment in Platform Science
text: PACCAR's (PCAR) minority equity investment in integrating Platform Science's Virtual Vehicle technology with the PACCAR Connect telematics system will simplify the vehicle I.T. environment.

title: California Is Boosting Shares of Electric-Truck Makers
text: The Golden State is eliminating sales of gasoline-powered cars by 2035. Now it wants half of the heavy-duty trucks in operation in California to be all-electric by then.

title: PACCAR and Platform Science Announce Strategic Equity Investment
text: BELLEVUE, Wash.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PACCAR announced today that it has made a minority equity investment in its connected truck partner, Platform Science. This strategic investment complements the partnership recently launched by PACCAR and Platform Science to integrate Platform Science's Virtual Vehicle technology with the PACCAR Connect telematics system.

title: PACCAR Recognizes Top Performing Suppliers in North America
text: BELLEVUE, Wash.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PACCAR utilizes its comprehensive Supplier Performance Management program (SPM) to evaluate supplier achievements in the areas of product development, operations and aftermarket support, and alignment with PACCAR's key business objectives. Each year, PACCAR recognizes its top performing suppliers in the SPM program. This honor is given to suppliers that reach the SPM Master, Leader and Achiever status.

title: 3 Domestic Auto Stocks Well-Poised to Fend Off Industry Woes

title: PACCAR Recognizes 10 PPM Quality Award Winners
text: BELLEVUE, Wash.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PACCAR annually recognizes suppliers who exceed PACCAR's 10 ppm quality standard, or the equivalent of 10 defective parts for every million components shipped to PACCAR. To qualify, suppliers must also meet demanding criteria for customer support and continuous improvement. For 2022, PACCAR recognizes 453 suppliers in 34 countries on five continents for achieving this high level of quality performance.

title: Is PACCAR (PCAR) Ready to Charge Into an Electric Future?
